=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:24-7:5) TS377011: `Effect.fn` returns a reusable function that can take arguments, but it is invoked immediately here. `Effect.gen` represents the immediate-use form for this pattern with Effect.withSpan("preview") piped in the end to maintain tracing spans. effect(effectFnIife)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnIife for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnIife for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnIife_preview.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics *:off
// @effect-diagnostics effectFnIife:warning
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const preview = Effect.gen(function* () {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(1);
})
